Introduction

The Strange Case of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde tells the story of a lawyer investigating the connection of two persons, Dr. Henry Jekyll and Mr. Edward Hyde. Chief among the novel’s supporting cast is a man by the name of Mr. Poole, Dr. Jekyll’s loyal butler. This demo site...

Options

Basic light and dark mode support is included. Colors are also provided for your own customization. Dark mode Creating themes Colors Gray colors Dark mode Dark mode is enabled automatically via CSS media query—you’ll find the source code for this in the _sass/_variables.scss stylesheet. If you’re familiar with CSS custom...
